productDisplayName: Nike Women Solid Grey Track Pants
description: CompositionGrey tracks made of 88% recycled polyester and 12% spandex Dri-Fit fabric, and has a wide waistband with an embroidered swoosh logoFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Line dryDo not ironDo not dry clean Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit athletes demand for focus, these nike training pants comes in a slim fiot design with a slight flare below the knees.
